overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt path at night during a storm. The character moves steadily through countryside with wooden fences and sunflowers giving way to stone walls as rain begins to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: countryside path between wooden fenced fields with sunflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through rural farmland at night

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence lining the left side of the path
wooden fence on the right side with tall grass beyond
field of yellow sunflowers visible behind the left fence
dense dark forest trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path at night, flanked by wooden fences with sunflowers visible on the left. The atmosphere is dark and moody with forest trees looming in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: countryside path transitioning from wooden fences to stone walls

events.description: wooden fence on left transitions to stacked stone wall as sunflowers disappear from view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the rural architecture shifts from wooden fences to stone walls

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall replacing the wooden fence on the left side

segments.scene_description: The path continues as the wooden fences give way to a stone wall on the left and open grassy areas. The sunflowers disappear from view while the character maintains a steady pace through the changing rural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with stone walls during rainfall

events.description: brief brightening of the sky followed by return to darkness as storm intensifies
rain becomes visibly falling, creating streaks in the camera view

agents.ego_description: walking through the increasingly dark and rainy forest path with stone walls

entered.detail: visible rain streaks falling through the atmosphere
thick tree canopy closing in overhead on both sides

segments.scene_description: The scene darkens further as rain begins to fall visibly, with the path now enclosed by dense forest vegetation and stone walls. The atmosphere becomes more ominous as the storm intensifies around the forested trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path at night that transforms from a moody countryside trail into a dark, rain-swept forest. It begins on a narrow dirt path flanked by wooden fences and sunflowers, with the silhouettes of distant trees looming ahead. As the character advances, the wooden fences give way to a stone wall and open grassy areas while the sunflowers disappear from view. The scene then shifts as the path becomes enclosed by dense forest vegetation and stone walls, with the lighting darkening further. Finally, the atmosphere becomes increasingly ominous as visible rain begins to fall and the storm intensifies around the forested trail.
